issue_types.IT-VRO: Validator Reliance Only - test only calls result_validator
issue_types.IT-NTV: No Trial Verification - missing trial count assertion
issue_types.IT-NCV: No Config Verification - missing config value checks
issue_types.IT-NSR: No Stop Reason Check - missing stop_reason assertion
issue_types.IT-NRV: No Range Validation - continuous params not range-checked

root_causes.RC-MA: Missing Assertions - expected behavior not verified
root_causes.RC-WA: Weak Assertions - assertions too weak to catch failures
root_causes.RC-MV: Missing Validation - no validation of values

top_patterns.prevention: Add explicit assertions for trials and configs before validator call

issues.description: Test relies only on result_validator without explicit assertions for trials/configs
issues.fix_suggestion: Add assertions: len(result.trials) >= 1, verify config values
